outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility due to negative aggregate GEX and heavy intraday options friction.
outlook.summary: The market is trapped in a fierce tug-of-war between the massive 700 Put Wall and 710 Call Wall. While short-term GEX is positive, the heavily negative Monthly GEX (-0.59B) amplifies directional risk. Extremely high 0DTE volume at 708-710 suggests a fierce intraday battle with dealers actively defending the 710 resistance. A failure to hold 705 opens the path to the 700 magnet.

levels.motivazione: Resonance level across all expiries (0DTE, WEEKLY, MONTHLY) with massive Call OI and exceptional 0DTE volume (83k), acting as a hard structural ceiling.
Resonance level across all expiries. Peak Put OI in WEEKLY (56k) and strong in MONTHLY (22k), providing massive structural support.
Resonance support level with high Put OI in 0DTE (9.8k) and MONTHLY (21k), reinforced by the WEEKLY Max Pain at 695.
0DTE Gamma Flip level marking the critical transition threshold where dealer hedging flips polarity.
0DTE Max Pain level indicating strong dealer gravitational pull to minimize option payouts at expiration.
High 0DTE Put volume (57k) acting as an intraday friction zone and immediate support below spot.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive weekly and monthly GEX suppresses directional moves, indicating a tight consolidation range.
outlook.summary: The market is trapped between structural support at 640 and massive Call resistance at 650. The 0DTE negative GEX is offset by strong positive GEX in weekly and monthly expirations, leading to dealer hedging that suppresses volatility. Expect price pinning around the 645 level as market makers defend their short gamma exposures against the massive 0DTE options volume, while respecting the 650 magnetic ceiling.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive Call OI across all expirations (0DTE: 5623, WEEKLY: 6795, MONTHLY: 39339). It acts as a strict resistance and magnet capped by dealer short gamma hedging.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE Max Pain and heavy Put OI in both 0DTE (5418) and WEEKLY (9507). Bears have aggressively defended this level, establishing major structural support.
PIVOT: Monthly gamma flip level. Crossing this shifts the monthly dealer positioning from short to long gamma, potentially triggering an aggressive short-covering rally.
levels.sintesiOperativa: BREAKOUT TRIGGER: Watch for momentum shift

levels.motivazione: CONFLUENCE: Heavy Put OI in WEEKLY (7665) and MONTHLY (19962). This is the definitive structural floor for the current and upcoming cycles.
WALL: High volume and OI on both Calls and Puts in 0DTE and WEEKLY. Price is gravitating and pinning here due to equal hedging pressures from both sides.

outlook.summary: Market exhibits neutral sentiment with a flat volatility skew. Open Interest is structurally absent across all expirations, but significant intraday volume concentrates at deep In-The-Money call strikes (6900-6930). This suggests active institutional delta adjustments or roll operations rather than new directional bets. Expect price attraction towards high-volume strike centers.

levels.motivazione: Massive intraday volume confluence between 0DTE (450) and WEEKLY (74) expirations. Represents a heavy delta-hedging magnet for market makers despite zero open interest.
Significant volume node in 0DTE (151) and WEEKLY (217). Acts as a structural friction level where continuous intraday hedging flow is concentrated.
Exceptional monthly volume (713) with zero OI indicates large block trading or institutional positioning. Functions as a deep baseline magnet.
Highest absolute Open Interest (5) in the dataset at the monthly expiration. While ITM, it marks the nearest significant options structure above the spot price.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to strongly positive aggregate GEX creating a stable, mean-reverting environment.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a bullish to neutral structural profile supported by positive Total GEX (0.52B to 1.17B) across all expirations, which suppresses volatility. A 'reverse_smirk' in 0DTE confirms underlying bullish momentum. Heavy Call OI below the spot (especially the massive 26700 level) acts as a structural magnet and dealer support zone, while Call OI above spot establishes firm resistance boundaries.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI (42 in 0DTE, 165 in WEEKLY, 3792 in MONTHLY) exactly at this strike. Dealers are long calls and will aggressively buy underlying futures if price drops to maintain delta neutrality, creating structural support.
Significant Call OI in 0DTE (78) and WEEKLY (44) combined with unusual volume activity (Vol/OI > 4.0 in 0DTE). Acts as a primary intraday resistance level.
Strong Call OI in MONTHLY (484) combined with highly unusual volume in 0DTE (Vol 135 vs OI 26). Marks a local resistance barrier before 27k.
Enormous Call OI in both 0DTE (746) and WEEKLY (746). Far below spot, this represents a massive structural anchor point and extreme downside attraction in case of a market crash.
Notable Put OI in WEEKLY (39) and MONTHLY (58). Provides a secondary institutional support floor between the spot and deep call magnets.
Dominant Call OI in MONTHLY (378) and WEEKLY (74). Acts as the upper bound of the structural consolidation range.
Significant Put OI in MONTHLY (220). A strong structural hedge zone that provides reliable downside support.
